stabilityTiers.summary: Public contract intended for production use.
stabilityTiers.guidance: Core constructs must stay aligned across parser, compiler, runtime, docs, and examples.

stabilityTiers.summary: Public but still evolving; consumers should expect guided change.
stabilityTiers.guidance: Beta constructs should be documented and validated, but may require migration notes or compatibility lanes.

stabilityTiers.summary: Not a stable public contract yet.
stabilityTiers.guidance: Experimental constructs should warn clearly in tooling and must not be treated as guaranteed portable syntax.

constructs.title: Built-in Functions
constructs.summary: Pure and impure helper functions available to value resolution and interpolation.

constructs.title: Handoff History Strategy
constructs.syntax: history: auto | none | summary_only | full | { mode: last_n, count }
constructs.summary: Controls how much parent conversation history is forwarded during handoff; the platform default is auto, which prefers summary_only when a real handoff summary exists and otherwise falls back to bounded raw history.

constructs.title: Handoff ON_RETURN
constructs.summary: Configures how a parent resumes after a child handoff through a structured action/handler object with optional field mapping.

constructs.title: RETURN_HANDLERS
constructs.summary: Named parent-resume handlers let RETURN:true handoffs clear state and optionally emit a follow-up response without inventing pseudo-agent targets.

constructs.title: Recall Events
constructs.summary: Canonical lifecycle event names used by recall hooks.

constructs.title: Handoff Memory Grants
constructs.summary: Explicit cross-agent grants expose only the named memory paths to the receiving agent with declared access semantics.

constructs.title: execution_tree Memory Scope
constructs.summary: Durable workflow-scoped memory shared across one execution or handoff tree, isolated from broader user/project persistence.

constructs.title: Agent-local LOOKUP_TABLES
constructs.summary: Agent-local lookup tables remain experimental; project runtime config lookup_tables are the canonical shared source for lookup-backed gathers.

constructs.title: Generated Doc Mirrors
constructs.summary: Canonical app doc mirrors are generated from shared source documents and contract facts.

tierInference.semantics: CEL violation predicate evaluated locally; true means the guardrail fires and false means the content passes.
Provider-backed classifier or guardrail service. Threshold applies to the provider score.
Natural-language LLM-as-judge evaluation. Threshold applies to the LLM score.

guardrails.localCheckSemantics: Local check expressions are CEL violation predicates: true means the guardrail fires and false means the content passes.

defaultContentSafety.name: content_safety
defaultContentSafety.rule: Does the user message request harmful, abusive, threatening, harassing, or unsafe content?
defaultContentSafety.message: I can't help with that request.

categories.name: math
categories.description: Numeric helpers for arithmetic and rounding.

categories.name: formatting
categories.description: Presentation helpers for masking, date, and currency formatting.

categories.name: type_coercion
categories.description: Type predicates and basic coercion helpers.

categories.name: array
categories.description: Helpers for array length and simple record lookup.

categories.name: object
categories.description: Helpers for enumerating and merging object values.

lifecycleEvents.description: After an entity or field value is extracted.
When a flow step is entered.
When a flow step is exited.

historyStrategies.name: auto
historyStrategies.description: Prefer the authored handoff summary when it is present and safe to use; otherwise fall back to the last 5 messages (or the project override). This is the platform default.

historyStrategies.name: none
historyStrategies.description: Do not pass summary or raw message history. Use this only for an intentionally fresh child context.

historyStrategies.name: summary_only
historyStrategies.description: Pass only the summary field and no raw message history.

historyStrategies.name: full
historyStrategies.description: Pass summary plus the full available message history.

historyStrategies.name: last_n
historyStrategies.description: Pass summary plus only the last N messages. The legacy shorthand `last_<n>` remains accepted during the compatibility window.

coordinationActions.semantics: Continue in the parent after timeout without escalating.
Escalate to the configured human/system target after timeout.
Return a custom response message when the handoff times out.
Continue the parent agent after the child returns.
Resume the parent intent path after the child returns.

systemVariables.name: _abl_constraint_checkpoint_kind
systemVariables.description: Internal structural checkpoint kind for constraint evaluation.

systemVariables.name: _abl_constraint_checkpoint_target
systemVariables.description: Internal structural checkpoint target for constraint evaluation.

systemVariables.name: abl
systemVariables.description: ABL helper-function namespace available in expression and guardrail conditions.

systemVariables.name: always
systemVariables.description: Built-in truthy sentinel for unconditional expressions.

systemVariables.name: channel
systemVariables.description: Current channel identifier available to expression validation/runtime context.

systemVariables.name: customer_id
systemVariables.description: Current customer/contact identifier when the runtime has resolved one.

systemVariables.name: intent
systemVariables.description: Current detected intent value when available.

systemVariables.name: last_<tool_name>_result
systemVariables.description: Raw tool result stored in session values when tool execution leaves result storage enabled.

systemVariables.name: last_input
systemVariables.description: Previous user input value when available.

systemVariables.name: previous_system_message_was_offer
systemVariables.description: Internal offer-tracking flag exposed to expression validation.

systemVariables.name: project_id
systemVariables.description: Current project identifier when the runtime has resolved scoped project context.

systemVariables.name: result
systemVariables.description: Current result variable reference when populated by execution flow.

systemVariables.name: session_id
systemVariables.description: Current session identifier; also auto-injected into tool params when declared in the tool schema.

systemVariables.name: tenant_id
systemVariables.description: Current tenant identifier; also auto-injected into tool params when declared in the tool schema.

systemVariables.name: user_id
systemVariables.description: Current authenticated user identifier. This is system-owned session context and should be treated as immutable in public ABL authoring.

compatibilityNotes.summary: When no explicit history strategy is declared, handoffs default to `auto`.
compatibilityNotes.guidance: Use `summary_only` only when the handoff provides a real summary and the child should not receive raw history. `auto` keeps that behavior when safe and otherwise falls back to bounded raw history.

compatibilityNotes.summary: HANDOFF targets machine agents only: a compiled local agent or a declared remote agent endpoint.
compatibilityNotes.guidance: Use `ESCALATE` for human/system resolution. If you need a machine orchestration step before human transfer, hand off to a real agent such as `Live_Agent_Transfer`, then let that agent escalate.

compatibilityNotes.summary: Legacy DSL `history: last_<n>` remains accepted and lowers into the canonical structured form `{ mode: last_n, count: n }`.
compatibilityNotes.guidance: Prefer the typed authoring form `history: { mode: last_n, count: n }` in new docs and generated YAML. Keep `last_<n>` only as a compatibility input.

compatibilityNotes.summary: App-facing full-specification pages are generated from canonical docs sources.
compatibilityNotes.guidance: Edit `docs/reference/ABL_SPEC.md` and rerun `pnpm abl:docs:generate` instead of editing app mirror files directly.
